meaning: n.大衣内的上衣,绒毛,内层油漆
examples: The undercoat is thick and must not show through.
The undercoat on black and tan dogs also may be grey or tan.
The quantity of undercoat is affected by climate and season.
The undercoat is made of a polymer that acts like the glue on a Post-it note.
As is often the case with paint jobs, the new anti-chemical-weapon paint needs an undercoat and a top coat.
